summary: Refresh access token when fewer than 60s remain rather than waiting for expiry.
reason: authHeader() previously refreshed only AFTER time.Now().After(c.Config.TokenExpiry). A token valid at authHeader() time could expire mid-flight on a slow request (large sync batch, paginated walk), and the client doesn't retry 401s. A 60s proactive buffer trades one extra refresh per session for elimination of mid-request 401s on long-running commands. Greptile review caught this.
